mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate compresses the discount rate applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid deterioration in the labor market signals imminent recession risk, triggering risk-off equity repricing and negative forward returns within one week.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in more than 60 percent of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike signal.

mechanism_narrative: Joint strength in housing starts and retail sales indicates robust consumer demand, supporting corporate earnings growth and positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to predict forward returns with a directional accuracy exceeding 55 percent over a 3-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: In late-cycle expansions, supply chain bottlenecks amplify inflationary pressures, prompting aggressive Fed tightening that compresses equity multiples and drives negative returns.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive when industrial production exceeds the threshold and inflation expectations stay anchored below 2.5 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in real GDP accelerates corporate revenue expectations, driving immediate positive equity returns as earnings revisions move higher.
failure_condition: Quarterly GDP growth shows no statistically significant correlation with subsequent 5-day equity returns across multiple decades.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above target forces prolonged monetary tightening, increasing discount rates and reducing the present value of future corporate cash flows.
failure_condition: Forward equity returns remain positive despite sustained inflation readings above the threshold, indicating decoupling from discount rate mechanics.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous payroll growth and stable unemployment confirm a healthy labor market, reducing recession probability and supporting equity risk premiums over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces a negative directional accuracy below 50 percent when tested against rolling 10-year equity return data.

mechanism_narrative: During post-shock recoveries, fiscal and monetary support combined with pent-up demand drives aggressive earnings revisions upward, boosting short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Equity returns decline when GDP growth exceeds the threshold during recovery periods, contradicting the earnings revision channel.
